# Optional PPTX Editing Guidance

Default workflow: review pasted or extracted slide text and provide revised slide content, speaker notes, and edit instructions.

If direct `.pptx` editing is later needed, document it separately using an approved workflow such as Microsoft PowerPoint, organization templates, LibreOffice, python-pptx, PptxGenJS, or a governed document/deck workflow. Do not require direct binary deck editing for this skill.
